steps.description: Mixing (Et4N)2[Fe-(Ph,Me)bTAML] and cellulose.
Oxidant (Na2CO3.1.5H2O2) was added iteratively (5 equiv. each time with respect to the catalyst) with continuous grinding by pestle until the catalyst color bleaches out.
Dissolving the reaction mixture in water
Dialyzing through a membrane of 3.5 kDa molecular weight cut-off to remove the smaller impurities
Lyophilizing the dialyzed water to obtain the product.

evaluation.reasoning: The extraction is globally correct. The extraction is mostly accurate but misses the oxidant’s amount and units in the starting materials. The LLM also confused equipment between two syntheses, incorrectly adding a mixer mill to Synthesis 1 (which only uses a mortar and pestle) and including a lyophilizer, which isn’t explicitly mentioned.

scores.structural_completeness_reasoning: The structure is correct, all information is present
scores.material_extraction_reasoning: The extraction is almost correct but the target compound Carboxylate-functionalized cellulose nanospheres (CNS) is not correct, CNS is the nanosphere without functionalization. The amount and unit of oxydant are missing in starting materials.
scores.equipment_extraction_reasoning: The LLM was confused and mixed up the equipment for Synthesis 1 with that for Synthesis 2, it added the mixer mill even though only the mortar and pestle are used for Synthesis 1. The LLM added "Lyophilizer" to the equipment list even though it is not explicitly mentioned in the article, although we can implicitly understand from the verb "lyophilized" that a lyophilizer was used.
scores.semantic_accuracy_reasoning: The semantic accuracy is partially correct,the amount and unit of oxydant are missing.
scores.overall_reasoning: The extraction is globally correct, The extraction is mostly accurate but misses the oxidant’s amount and unit in the starting materials. The LLM also confused equipment between two syntheses, incorrectly adding a mixer mill to Synthesis 1 (which only uses a mortar and pestle) and including a lyophilizer, which isn’t explicitly mentioned.

evaluation.reasoning: The extraction suffers from poor chemical and procedural accuracy. The LLM confused reagents between syntheses, misassigned equipment, included hallucinated items, and reported incorrect conditions. While the JSON structure is solid, the semantic errors and missing information significantly reduce the reliability of the extracted procedure.

scores.structural_completeness_reasoning: The structure respected the main fields such as starting materials, steps, equipment and conditions.
scores.material_extraction_reasoning: It confused corncob powder, which is the biomass reagent used in synthesis 3 instead of cellulose which is the correct reagent for synthesis 1. It doesn’t give the amount of Sodium Percarbonate and it would be nice to give the formula as it was mentioned a few times in the method paragraph. Also it is written water in starting material which is wrong, it is used to dissolve in the end of the synthesis
scores.process_steps_reasoning:
Step 1 is incorrect. The addition of the catalyst is right(and it’s better to mention (Et4N)2[Fe-(Ph,Me)bTAML]) but the reagent is not biomass corncob powder (it is a confusion with synthesis 3), but rather cellulose. Also the description said “mortal or ball mir jar and grind well” for the equipment but it is completely wrong, it is only with a mortar.
The equipment is wrong in step 1 as mentioned.
The LLM added "Lyophilizer" to the equipment list even though it is not explicitly mentioned in the article, although we can implicitly understand from the verb "lyophilized" that a lyophilizer was used.
scores.equipment_extraction_reasoning: The equipment extraction is almost correct but there is no ball mill for this synthesis and not "Lyophilizer" as it is not explicitly mentioned in the text.
scores.conditions_extraction_reasoning: Conditions are not respected in step 2. The duration is not 2.5h but 1.5h.
scores.semantic_accuracy_reasoning: The semantic accuracy is poor. The LLM combined several syntheses into one. It did not identify the correct reagents with the correct equipment.
scores.overall_reasoning: The extraction suffers from poor chemical and procedural accuracy. The LLM confused reagents between syntheses, misassigned equipment, included hallucinated items, and reported incorrect conditions. While the JSON structure is solid, the semantic errors and missing information significantly reduce the reliability of the extracted procedure.

steps.description: To a mortar, mixing of cellobiose and biomass (corncob/softwood pine powder).
Na2CO3.1.5H2O2 (SPC) as the oxidant (each time 5 eqv.) was added in equal portions over a period of 2.5 h.
After completion of the reaction, the reaction mixture was dissolved in water
Dialyzing through a membrane of 3.5 kDa molecular weight cut-off to remove the smaller impurities
Lyophilizing the dialyzed water to obtain the product.
